summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in the diff. The quesadilla menu card image reference has been updated to 'quesadilla-cheese-sides.dim_800x600.png' in MenuSection.tsx, and a creative Mexican food tagline bar ('Life's Too Short for Bland Food — Eat Like You Mean It') has been added to Header.tsx. No missing requirements or hallucinated features are identified.
